summary: All 5 bug fixes verified working via backend API tests (9/9 passed) and frontend UI tests. Grooming flow asks clarifying questions before Places API. Quick reply tabs render correctly. Leash query does NOT generate meal plan tip card. Pet First doctrine applied - Mira mentions pet name 'Lola'.

issues: Modal appears on login - may want to dismiss automatically or show only in dev mode

critical_code_review_comments: Backend fixes verified: Lines 4638-4666 in mira_routes.py correctly skip Places API for grooming/boarding until user provides location preference
Conversation intelligence fix verified: Lines 619-637 in conversation_intelligence.py skip tip card generation for product queries like 'leash'
Frontend quick_replies rendering verified: ChatMessage.jsx lines 371-386 render header tiles when quickReplies array is populated
Backend returns quick_replies in API response when clarifying questions are asked
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mira OS bug fixes verified. API endpoint: POST /api/mira/os/understand-with-products. Key test queries: 'i need a groomer' (should ask clarifying question, return quick_replies, no places), 'i need a leash for my dog' (should NOT return tip_card, show products instead). Frontend renders quick reply tiles in header area when backend returns quick_replies array.

features_tested.grooming_clarifying_question: PASS - Mira asks 'simple trim or fuller grooming session?' before showing places
features_tested.grooming_quick_replies: PASS - Returns ['Simple trim', 'Full grooming session', 'Not sure yet']
features_tested.grooming_no_places_shown: PASS - nearby_places_count is 0 on initial query
features_tested.boarding_clarifying_question: PASS - Mira asks about dates/duration before showing places
features_tested.leash_no_tip_card: PASS - tip_card is null for leash query
features_tested.collar_no_tip_card: PASS - tip_card is null for collar query
features_tested.pet_first_doctrine: PASS - Response mentions pet name 'Lola' in personalized context
features_tested.frontend_quick_reply_tiles: PASS - Header tiles render with data-testid='header-tile-{n}'

verified_fixes.fix_1_grooming_clarification: VERIFIED - Backend skips Places API for grooming intent until explicit location request
verified_fixes.fix_2_quick_replies: VERIFIED - Backend returns quick_replies in response.quick_replies, frontend renders as header tiles
verified_fixes.fix_3_leash_no_tip_card: VERIFIED - Product keywords like 'leash' skip tip card generation in should_generate_tip_card()
verified_fixes.fix_4_boarding_clarification: VERIFIED - Same hardcoded flow as grooming applies to boarding intent
verified_fixes.fix_5_pet_first_doctrine: VERIFIED - LLM responses personalize with pet name 'Lola' instead of generic breed language
